backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining diagram state types (icons, connections, drawings, lines, text labels, images), user profiles, and CRUD operations for saving/loading/deleting named diagrams with authorization checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the requirement to replace seven attack path diagram icon images with uploaded file type icons (Word, PDF, Excel, Script, ZIP, DLL, PowerPoint) at specific XPath locations.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing components, pages, hooks, utilities, and configuration for the threat hunting portal application with attack path visualization.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme CSS variables for a security-focused dark blue/teal palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite-powered React application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/index.ts: Example code snippet demonstrating html2canvas usage for exporting canvas elements to PNG images.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication flow, profile setup modal, and route protection requiring login for all pages.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Main canvas component for attack path visualization handling icon placement, connections, drawings, text labels, images, drag-and-drop, resizing, multi-selection, and user interactions across different modes.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: SVG-based arrow connector component rendering directional lines between icons with rotation support, selection highlighting, and click handling.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Renders draggable icons for attack path diagrams, mapping IconType to image assets and handling drag-and-drop events.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Provides a toolbar for attack path diagram editing with icon selection, drawing tools (pencil, arrow, text, eraser), text formatting controls, image upload, and save/load/undo actions.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with header navigation (Reports, Attack Path, New Report), user profile display, hero banner on homepage, and footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Dialog for loading saved attack path diagrams, displaying diagram metadata (icons, connections, text labels, last modified), with delete confirmation functionality.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Logout button component that clears Internet Identity authentication and query cache when clicked.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with Internet Identity authentication, displaying security messaging and a login button for accessing the threat intelligence system.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: Searchable combobox for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques with support for custom technique entries, displaying technique IDs, names, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: Button component that triggers PDF generation for threat hunt reports using the pdfGenerator utility, with loading state and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts users to enter their name for profile setup on first login, with form validation and submission handling via useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports with fields for title, author, executive summary, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, timeline, attack vectors, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, and recommendations.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: Dialog component for saving attack path diagrams with a name input field, handling save/cancel actions and displaying loading states.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Static data file containing MITRE ATT&CK technique definitions organized by tactics (Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, Privilege Escalation) with IDs, names, and descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages the backend actor instance, handling authentication state, identity changes, and initializing access control with optional admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: Custom hook managing the complete state for attack path diagrams including placed icons, connections, drawings, text labels, images, drawing tools, selection state, and undo/redo history with a 50-state limit.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: React Query mutation hook for deleting diagram states by ID, invalidating the allDiagrams query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all saved diagrams from the backend actor, enabled only when actor is initialized.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile from the backend, with custom loading state that accounts for actor initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a specific diagram state by ID from the backend actor, enabled only when actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity storage, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (getAllReports, getReport, saveReport, deleteReport) with local DetailedReport type definitions; all backend methods are disabled/stubbed as functionality is no longer available.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile via the actor and invalidates the currentUserProfile query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook that saves a named diagram state via the actor and invalidates both diagramState and allDiagrams query caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors using OKLCH color space, including primary, secondary, muted, destructive, and chart color definitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root React component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers for state management and authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Main page component for the attack path diagram editor, managing canvas state (icons, connections, drawings, text, images), toolbar interactions, and save/load/clear dialog workflows with undo support.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component that renders a form for creating new threat hunt reports, handling form submission via useSaveReport mutation and navigating back on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed view of a single threat hunt report with sections for executive summary, timeline, attack vector, evidence, affected systems, remediation, and recommendations, including PDF download functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: React component that displays a table of threat hunting reports with metadata, MITRE techniques count, IOCs count, and actions (view, download PDF, delete). Includes loading states, error handling, and empty state with a create button.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for html2canvas type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for jspdf type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility function that generates a printable PDF report by opening a new window with formatted HTML content including report metadata, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and analysis sections with styled CSS.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and methods to store, retrieve, and clear parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme with sidebar colors, custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), shadows, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite configuration for React app with path aliases, environment variable injection for canister IDs, proxy setup for local API calls to port 4943, and build optimizations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a Threat Hunting Portal with one existing feature for replacing attack path diagram icons and one pending feature request to change icon images to match their names.
